title: Username Denylist
literals-help: One username per line. Matched case-insensitively against the registration username.
patterns-help: One JavaScript regular expression per line. Bare form (e.g. ^mod[0-9]+$) or slash-delimited form with flags (e.g. /staff/i) are both supported. Invalid patterns are skipped and logged.
error.username-not-allowed: Sorry, that username is not allowed. Please choose another.
